Your family understood nothing.

The Comprehension Gap

Nearly 1 billion medical encounters happen in the U.S. every year and almost every one leaves patients confused, undertreated, or unable to follow through on what they were told. It costs the system hundreds of billions. It costs families something harder to measure.

You didn't fail to understand.
The system failed to communicate.
That's not a small problem. That's the whole problem.

$236B The annual cost of low health literacy to the U.S. healthcare system
Why I Built This

I sat in an ICU for days, holding papers I couldn't understand, making decisions I wasn't qualified to make.
I searched for a tool like this.
There wasn't one. So I built it.

When my father had a catastrophic brain bleed, I became my family's medical coordinator overnight. Nobody gave me that title. I just became the one who handled it.

Three days after he was discharged, I was minutes away from driving him back to the ER. I didn't know if what I was seeing was dangerous deterioration or normal recovery. I had no way to tell.

I found the answer — but only because I knew how to look for it. Most families don't.

CLE.MD would have given us a post-discharge symptom guide before we ever left the hospital. Here's what's normal. Here's what to watch for. Here's exactly when to call 911.

I'm Jess — a daughter, a mother, an advocate. And this is the tool I wish had existed.

— Jess Allen, Founder & CEO
You've Been Here

You don't need another app.
You need someone who speaks both languages — medicine and human.

The Moment After The Diagnosis

The doctor left the room. You wrote down what you could. You're sitting in the parking lot trying to remember what "palliative" means, wondering if you should have asked more questions.

CLE.MD translates what you just heard into language you can act on — and shares it with your family so you're not carrying this alone.

When The Words Don't Translate

The doctor spoke. The interpreter did their best. But medical terminology doesn't translate — not really. You nodded because you didn't want to slow things down, but you left not knowing what comes next.

CLE.MD translates medicine into your language — not just the words, but the meaning. In 8 languages, built for the people the system was never designed for.

The Discharge Moment

The nurse handed you four pages of instructions and a follow-up three weeks out. Nobody explained what "call your doctor if symptoms worsen" actually means for this specific condition.

CLE.MD gives you a tiered symptom guide. What's normal. What to watch. When to go back.

When It Never Stops Being Complicated

My father's oncologist added another medication last week. We're at fourteen now. I have a spreadsheet, a pill organizer, and I still can't tell you which ones interact or which ones are making him feel the way he feels.

CLE.MD organizes everything — what each medication does, how they work together, and what questions to bring to the next appointment.

What We Are — And What We're Not

This isn't a chatbot.
This isn't a symptom checker.
This is the comprehension layer healthcare never had.

  • Voice-to-text recording of appointments you can read back, share, and reference later
  • Plain-language summaries of diagnoses, treatment plans, and discharge instructions — in up to 8 languages
  • Document and photo upload so you can make sense of what you received
  • Medication photo recognition
  • Care Circles for coordinating care across your family — so one person isn't carrying everything
  • Tiered safety guidance: what's normal, what to watch, and when to seek emergency care

CLE.MD does not:

  • Diagnose or prescribe
  • Replace your clinical team
  • Store your medical data on our servers
98% medical accuracy — no hallucinations, no guesswork.

You probably have questions.

Here are the real answers.

What exactly is CLE.MD?

CLE.MD is a family health platform — not a chatbot, not a symptom checker, not a patient portal. We're the missing layer between what your medical team communicates and what your family can actually understand and act on.

Is this just AI making up medical information?

No. CLE.MD operates at 98% medical accuracy. Every response is grounded in clinical knowledge with safety protocols that escalate when a situation may require emergency care. No hallucinations, no guesswork.

Is my medical information stored?

No. CLE.MD processes your information in real time without server storage of your medical data. Your conversations are yours. Full HIPAA compliance certification is in progress.

Can CLE.MD replace my doctor?

Never. CLE.MD is not a substitute for clinical care. We help you understand and advocate within the care you're already receiving — not replace the people providing it.

Who is this for?

If you've ever sat in a hospital room holding papers you couldn't understand, managed a parent's care from a distance, or been the one your family calls for every appointment and update — this was built for you.

Is it really free to start?

Yes. Start free, no credit card required. Upgrade when you're ready.

From Jess

Healthcare is one of the hardest experiences a family faces.
You should not be facing the language barrier alone.

I built CLE.MD because I was you — sitting in a hospital room, holding a phone, searching for something that could help me understand what was happening to my father.

I found nothing.

What I built is what I needed that night. And it's what I want every family to have — before the crisis, during it, and in the quiet, confusing days after.

— Jess

No credit card. No commitment. Just clarity.
